name: audio-hooks
description: Audio notifications and system alerts for Claude Code, Cursor IDE, and Codex events.

interface.shortDescription: Audio and desktop notifications for Codex, Claude Code, and Cursor events
interface.longDescription: Audio Hooks plays configurable sounds, desktop notifications, optional TTS, and webhooks for agent lifecycle events including permission requests, tool use, compaction, subagents, and task completion.
defaultPrompt: Configure audio notifications for this coding session.
